title: Run AutoBiology Pipeline

title: Review end-to-end pipeline execution
description: Use a same-model sub-agent review to verify the full flow from text to 3D rendered video.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN all prior issues are closed THEN run same-model sub-agent review; WHEN gaps exist THEN append follow-up issues; WHEN successful THEN close CSV.
review_initial_requirements: Verify all prior rows are closed.
review_regression_requirements: Verify end-to-end evidence shows that a raw text SOP successfully resulted in a mapped Blender 3D animation AND a successfully exported .mp4 video file.
